summary: Test coverage for config.test.ts exercises uses the user shell working directory when no default project is configured; keeps the explicit default project ahead of the platform default work dir; accepts ADAPTER_DEFAULT_PROJECT_DIR as a sidecar-friendly default work dir override; loads DingTalk permission card template id from file or env
quotes_or_symbols: uses the user shell working directory when no default project is configured
keeps the explicit default project ahead of the platform default work dir
accepts ADAPTER_DEFAULT_PROJECT_DIR as a sidecar-friendly default work dir override
loads DingTalk permission card template id from file or env
